name: conductor
description: Home of Conductor — a safety-railed orchestration layer that turns Claude Code into a disciplined engineering team: it plans behind an approval gate, routes work to specialist plugins, tests and security-reviews every change, and stages the result for you to ship.

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: A safety-railed orchestration layer for Claude Code: frames any task, plans behind an approval gate, routes each step to the best specialist plugin (or a built-in fallback), tests and security-reviews every change, and stages the result for the human to ship. Hook-enforced rails: never commits or pushes, never touches production — even under skip-permissions. (The rails arm via Python 3; the SessionStart banner is your proof they're live.)
